mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, pay_time, deliver_time, receive_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, logistics_no, logistics_company, auto_receive_time, delivered, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM `order` WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, pay_time, deliver_time, receive_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, logistics_no, logistics_company, auto_receive_time, delivered, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM `order` WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, pay_time, deliver_time, receive_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, logistics_no, logistics_company, auto_receive_time, delivered, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM `order` WHERE status = 2 AND delivered = 0 AND deliver_time IS NOT NULL AND deliver_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, pay_time, deliver_time, receive_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, logistics_no, logistics_company, auto_receive_time, delivered, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM `order` WHERE status = 2 AND auto_receive_time IS NOT NULL AND auto_receive_time <= NOW() AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id AS buyer_id, u.nickname AS buyer_nickname, u.phone AS buyer_phone, o.total_amount, o.pay_amount, o.freight_amount, o.status, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_phone, o.receiver_address, o.remark, o.pay_time, o.deliver_time, o.receive_time, o.cancel_time, o.cancel_reason, o.logistics_no, o.logistics_company, o.delivered, o.auto_receive_time, o.create_time FROM `order` o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id AND oi.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND o.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unshipped, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS shipped, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS total FROM `order` o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id AND oi.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND o.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status != 4 THEN o.id END) AS totalCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 1 THEN o.id END) AS waitShipCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 3 THEN o.id END) AS finishedCount FROM `order` o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id AND oi.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND o.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalSkuCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.stock = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outOfStockCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.stock < #{lowStockThreshold} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lowStockCount FROM product_sku ps INNER JOIN product p ON ps.product_id = p.id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND ps.is_deleted = 0
